title: Personal website
subtitle: No site code exists yet. BedRock repo is a personal docs/context store, not a website scaffold.

blocks.label: Status
blocks.text: Blocked — agent needs a scaffold decision before writing code. BedRock repo contains `ONBOARDING.md`, `fact-sheets/`, `portfolio/`, `logs/` — not a website. No other repo looks like a personal site.

blocks.markdown:
## Agent findings (2026-04-22)

Opened `~/BedRock` expecting a marketing/personal site repo. Contents are:

- `INSTRUCTIONS.md`, `ONBOARDING.md` — personal context
- `context/`, `fact-sheets/`, `portfolio/` — unstructured personal docs
- `logs/` — personal journaling

No `package.json`, no framework, no deployable surface. A `/now` page as defined in the earlier brief cannot be written *anywhere* right now — there's no site to put it on.

## What I need from you (R002)

Three choices scoped so an agent can move next run:

1. **Bootstrap a new repo** — e.g. `Taylorblue123/wenxuan.dev`, Astro/Next static, deploy to Vercel. Agent can scaffold + `/now` stub + OG in one PR.
2. **Treat BedRock itself as the site** — agent adds Astro/Next scaffold on top of existing docs, publishes portfolio/* and fact-sheets/* behind a minimal shell.
3. **Skip for now** — we revisit when there's a real landing-page need (after Crumbs launch).

## What I will NOT do without your call

- Pick a framework, domain, or tone of voice on your behalf.
- Commit HTML to a repo that isn't meant to host one.
- Copy content from BedRock into a public site without your review.
